'''Grif''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], he was the [[Director of Fleet Intelligence|Director]] of [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]], but by [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], was succeeded by [[Ayddar Nylykerka]].
